# Hunger Hankerings

> Canadian snack commerce: curated themed snack boxes, corporate team delivery to multiple addresses, office pantry restocking, bulk and pallet programs, and snack box fundraising. Contact: hello@hungerhankerings.com.

Use the site’s public origin from `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL` when resolving links in non-production environments.

## Primary entry points

- `/` — Homepage (programs overview, featured boxes)
- `/shop` — Shop all themed snack boxes (catalog)
- `/themed-snack-boxes` — Themed snack boxes landing
- `/gift-a-box` — Gift-oriented snack box flow
- `/fundraising` — Fundraising programs (commission model)
- `/our-programs` — Corporate programs hub
- `/faqs` — Full FAQ index (general, team, pantry, bulk)
- `/contact` — Contact / lead form

## Corporate service pages

- `/corporate/team-snack-boxes` — Multi-address team gifting, onboarding, appreciation
- `/corporate/office-snack-pantry` — Workplace pantry stocking and schedules
- `/corporate/bulk-pallet` — High-volume and pallet delivery to a central site

## Lead / program landing paths

- `/team-snacks-delivered` — Team snack delivery lead capture
- `/office-pantry-snack-service` — Office pantry lead capture

## Machine-readable extras

- `/sitemap.xml` — URL list including product detail pages when the catalog API is available
- Schema.org `Organization` and `WebSite` in the root layout; `FAQPage` on `/faqs`; `Product` + `BreadcrumbList` on `/products/[handle]`.

## Crawl policy

Transactional and account areas (`/cart`, `/checkout`, `/login`, `/register`, `/account`, `/order`, `/api`) are set to `noindex` in metadata and disallowed in `robots.txt` where applicable.
